name: precompile_kernel
full_help:
precompile_kernel

Description: 
Pre-synthesize a kernel IP

Syntax: 
precompile_kernel  [-synthesis_options <args>] [-kernel_name <arg>] [-force]
                   [-output_xo <arg>] [-hw_platform <arg>] [-platform <arg>]
                   [-user_ip_repo_paths <args>] -xo_path <arg> [-quiet]
                   [-verbose]

Returns: 
The path to the packaged XO container

Usage: 
  Name                   Description
  ----------------------------------
  [-synthesis_options]   Dictionary (Tcl dict) of synthesis run properties 
                         (e.g. {property1 value1 property2 value2 ...}) to be
                         applied for synthesis.
  [-kernel_name]         The name of the kernel
  [-force]               Overwrite existing XO file
  [-output_xo]           The name of the output XO
  [-hw_platform]         The XSA or hardware platform to target for 
                         precompilation
  [-platform]            The platform to target for precompilation
  [-user_ip_repo_paths]  Add existing directories to the list of IP 
                         repositories. Value is an absolute path or a partial
                         path relative the current working directory.
  -xo_path               The path of the XO container to precompile
  [-quiet]               Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]             Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Vitis, Acceleration, FileIO
